$comment: Design token file for the Pin Wheel Time Picker component
$description: Scroll-drum (drum-roll) time picker column. Renders 5 stacked rows at a time. Three column types: Hour (1–12), Minute (00–55 in 5-step increments), and AM-PM. The centre row is always the selected value; the rows immediately above/below are 'close' (slightly dimmer) and the outermost rows are 'far' (near-invisible). A horizontal selection band (top + bottom border) frames the selected row. For the AM-PM column only two real values exist (AM/PM); the remaining three slot positions are rendered as opacity-0 spacers to preserve the 5-row layout.

width.description: Fixed width for each picker column (Hour, Minute, or AM-PM)

padding.description: Uniform 10px inset on all sides of each row cell- xs - 10px

background.description: White background for every row cell regardless of state- gray/0 - #ffffff

typography.description: 14px Semibold, 20px line-height — used for all row values

far.description: Near-invisible text for rows 2 positions away from the selection (top and bottom rows)- gray/300 - #d0d5dd

close.description: Dimmed text for the rows immediately adjacent to the selected row- gray/500 - #667085

selected.description: #155eef — primary blue text on the active selected row

selection-band.description: Horizontal band that frames the selected middle row — rendered as a top and bottom border on that cell only

border-width.description: Thickness of the top and bottom selection border

border-color.description: Subtle gray border that delineates the selected row- gray/300 - #d0d5dd

hidden-slot-opacity.description: Opacity for spacer slots in the AM-PM column — 3 of the 5 rows are invisible (opacity 0) to keep the column height consistent with Hour and Minute columns while only exposing AM and PM as real values
